kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Edmund goes with exactly three of Blacksmith, Horseshoes, Riverside, and 15 coins.
Between Kingsford and Southgate, one goes with Cooper and the other with Mason.
Either Matilda goes with Pottery or Mason goes with Aldric.
The artisan who makes Candles' levy is lower than both Rowan and the artisan in Southgate.
If Riverside goes with 15 coins, then both 11 coins goes with Aldric and Kingsford goes with Mason.
Either Boots goes with Potter or someone in the Market Ward goes with Potter (but not both).
Exactly one of these is true: Matilda goes with Bridgegate; Blacksmith goes with 13 coins; Horseshoes goes with Eastcheap.
Either Godfrey goes with Horseshoes, or Fletcher goes with 15 coins — but not both.
The Fletcher's levy is lower than both Godfrey and the artisan who makes Boots.
Between Fletcher and Potter, one goes with Candles and the other with Tapestries.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Esther goes with exactly three of Bass, Spoon, Mossbank, and 6 lb.
Between Grayreach and Pinehollow, one goes with Bluegill and the other with Crappie.
Either Royce goes with Swimbait or Crappie goes with Cody.
The angler using the Spinnerbait's weight is lower than both Wade and the angler at Pinehollow.
If Mossbank goes with 6 lb, then both 2 lb goes with Cody and Grayreach goes with Crappie.
Either Crankbait goes with Perch or someone in the North Watershed goes with Perch (but not both).
Exactly one of these is true: Royce goes with Birchpool; Bass goes with 4 lb; Spoon goes with Foxglen.
Either Mabel goes with Spoon, or Catfish goes with 6 lb — but not both.
The angler who landed the Catfish's weight is lower than both Mabel and the angler using the Crankbait.
Between Catfish and Perch, one goes with Spinnerbait and the other with Wobbler.
